steps.title: Canonical event types and provider port
steps.description: Replace Claude Code-specific EventType/HookEvent in domain with canonical equivalents. Add EventProvider port trait.
acceptance_criteria: Domain module exports canonical event type enum with 6 tool-agnostic variants
Domain module exports canonical event struct with provider field
EventProvider port trait defines normalization contract
No Claude Code-specific names in domain or ports modules
architectural_constraints: Canonical types are the only event types in domain
EventProvider trait lives in ports module
Pure types only -- no IO, no framework imports

steps.title: Claude Code provider adapter
steps.description: Implement Claude Code provider that normalizes hook payloads into canonical events.
acceptance_criteria: Provider maps all 6 Claude Code event types to canonical equivalents
Provider extracts session_id from Claude Code payload
Provider returns error for unrecognized event types
Tool name extracted from PreToolUse/PostToolUse payloads
architectural_constraints: Claude Code-specific types private to this adapter module
Provider is a pure function: raw input -> canonical output, no IO

steps.title: Hook receiver integration with provider
steps.description: Update hook receiver to delegate normalization to Claude Code provider before writing canonical events via EventStore.
acceptance_criteria: Hook receiver uses provider to normalize before storage
EventStore receives and stores canonical events
All existing hook receiver behavior preserved (400 for unknown types, 200 after persist)
SQLite stores canonical event type names (tool_call_start, not pre_tool_use)
architectural_constraints: Hook handler does not import Claude Code types directly
EventStore write_event accepts canonical event type

steps.title: EventStore session events query and IPC commands
steps.description: Extend EventStore with get_events_for_session. Add get_sessions and get_session_events IPC commands.
acceptance_criteria: get_events_for_session returns events filtered by session_id, ordered chronologically
get_sessions IPC command exposes existing EventStore method to frontend
get_session_events IPC command accepts session_id and returns canonical events
Empty session returns empty array, not error
architectural_constraints: IPC commands follow existing pattern (AppState, Mutex lock)

steps.title: Design system CSS, fonts, and theme switching
steps.description: Extract all 5 theme CSS variable sets from norbert-mockup-v5.html. Load Rajdhani and Share Tech Mono fonts. Implement theme switching with localStorage persistence.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 themes from mockup available (Norbert, Claude Dark, VS Code Dark, Claude Light, VS Code Light)
Rajdhani font renders for UI labels; Share Tech Mono for data values
Theme switching mechanism changes active theme on all UI elements
Selected theme persists across app restarts via localStorage
Norbert theme is the default when no preference is stored
architectural_constraints: All colors via CSS custom properties, never hardcoded
Theme applied as CSS class on root element (.theme-nb, .theme-cd, .theme-vd, .theme-cl, .theme-vl)
Fonts loaded via Google Fonts link in HTML head

steps.title: Session list view
steps.description: Replace walking skeleton status display with session list. Session rows with glassmorphism cards, status dots, metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Session list displays all sessions ordered most-recent-first
Each row shows start timestamp, duration, and event count
Active sessions show pulsing green status dot; completed show dim dot
Empty state shows clear non-error message when no sessions exist
List polls for updates at existing 1-second interval
architectural_constraints: Session rows use .srow/.sdot/.sname patterns from mockup

steps.title: Event detail view with navigation
steps.description: Click session row to view chronological events. Back navigation returns to session list.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a session row shows event detail view with session header
Session header displays start time, duration, event count, status
Events listed chronologically with timestamp, canonical event type, and payload snippet
Tool name displayed for tool_call_start and tool_call_end events
Back to Sessions navigation returns to session list
architectural_constraints: Navigation via selectedSessionId state (null = list, non-null = detail)
Event list scrollable; session header stays fixed
Event type displayed as uppercase canonical label
